steps: Log in to your Todoist account (create one free at https://todoist.com/sign-up if needed)
Under the 'Developer' tab you will see your personal API token
Click 'Copy API token' to copy it to your clipboard

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: API Token
credential_fields.description: Your personal Todoist API token, sent as a Bearer token in the Authorization header

notes: Free tier available — personal API token works on the free Todoist plan
Each Todoist account has a single personal API token; it does not expire
Click 'Issue a new API token' in the settings to rotate the token if compromised
For OAuth2 app integrations (user-facing apps), create an OAuth app at https://todoist.com/developer/apps

test_endpoint.description: List all projects in the authenticated user's account
